error_signature: users can only have one role because its a type text column
title: Xano authentication fails due to single role limitation
symptom: Users are unable to log in and are not redirected to the appropriate page despite receiving 200 responses from Xano.
not_this_if: Users have a single role assigned
root_cause: The Xano authentication setup is configured to allow users to have only one role due to the column type being text. This causes issues when trying to match users with multiple roles against groups that require all roles to be present.
fix_steps: Create separate groups for each user role
Assign multiple groups to the page for OR logic handling
agent_instruction: Create separate groups for each role and assign them to the page to resolve the login issue.
